creator: tril@poczta.tril.pl
text:
> I am unable to reproduce this on my amd64 boxes (9.1 PRERELEASE).
>
> Could you check whether there is
> #define HAVE_AVX 0
> in config.h in mplayer's build dir?
>
> Riggs

Hello,

In both mencoder's and mplayer's build dir I have
#define HAVE_AVX 0
Also mplayer itself builds fine, problem occurs only when trying to 
build mencoder. I have 9.0 installed from iso on that box, could it be 
problem with clang in that particular dist?

-- 
Andrzej
